Translation.Text:
CM LOC®
Do only use original female parts of the CM LOC® bar produced by Cendres+Métaux. For ordering please contact your local dealer or refer to http://www.cmsa.ch/dental
Please refer to the Instruction for Use http://www.cmsa.ch/en/dental/products/attachments The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the Instruction for Use.
Cendres+Métaux does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of Cendres+Métaux origins.
